data.description: While under the effect of this spell, you take 6d6 psychic and insane damage. You are unable to take actions or reactions until you finish a long rest. Insane damage causes you to gibber incoherently, and creatures can't understand what you say; they can only hear incoherent gibberish. Greater restoration ends the effect of this spell on you.

300
Components: V,S, M (a drop of water a pinch dust)
of Duration: Concentration, to minutes
